Title: Entree
Subtitle:
SHARING PLATE

Subtitle:

Grilled salmon w. lemon herb sauce, greens and roasted vegetables

200g sirloin served medium rare served w. fries, slaw and your choice of red wine jus, garlic butter or mushroom sauce

Lettuce, mesclun, beetroot, carrot, crispy noodles, capsicum, red onion, honey roasted peanuts w. home-made Thai dressing. Your choice of beef, prawns or chicken
